user.title: Select Plant Species
user.description: Choose a plant from the library to monitor.

details.title: Plant Details
details.description: Give your plant a name and location.

entities.title: Link Sensors
entities.description: Link your existing Zigbee2MQTT sensor entities to this plant.

care.title: Care Tasks
care.description: Select which care tasks you want to track for this plant. The suggested tasks and intervals are based on the specific needs of your {plant_name}.

care_interval.title: {task_name} — Interval ({step_num}/{total})
care_interval.description: How often should "{task_name}" be done? The recommended interval is {default_interval} days.
